title: Want Stability? These REITs Are as Safe as They Come
text: REITs can offer a great combination of growth and income.

title: Crown Castle: Why This Wide Moat Dividend Growth Stock Is A Buy
text: Crown Castle is a strong, diversified wireless infrastructure company. Their core business has a wide moat and limited downside in a recession.

title: What Do Some of My Favorite S&P 500 Stocks Have In Common? They're All REITs
text: A cell tower company, a lab space owner, a data-center operator, and "The Monthly Dividend Company" are on this shortlist.

title: Crown Castle's (CCI) Q2 FFO & Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Robust 5G leasing environment and elevated tower space demand boost Crown Castle's (CCI) second-quarter top-and-bottom line growth. It raises its 2022 adjusted EBITDA outlook.

title: Crown Castle (CCI) Q2 FFO and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Crown Castle (CCI) delivered FFO and revenue surprises of 0.56% and 1.22%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Crown Castle Releases 2021 ESG Report
text: HOUSTON, July 20, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Crown Castle International Corp. (NYSE: CCI) ("Crown Castle" or the "Company") announced today the release of its 2021 Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) Report and launch of its ESG website, furthering its approach of providing timely and accessible ESG disclosures.

title: Crown Castle Reports Second Quarter 2022 Results and Updates Outlook for Full Year 2022
text: HOUSTON, July 20, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Crown Castle International Corp. (NYSE: CCI) ("Crown Castle") today reported results for the second quarter ended June 30, 2022 and updated its full year 2022 outlook to reflect improving operating conditions offset by increasing interest expense.

title: Down But Not Out: Buy These Beaten-Down Dividend Stocks Before They Boom Again
text: These dividend stocks have strong catalysts driving their growth.

title: Crown Castle: Critical Nationwide Infrastructure Fit For Long-Term Portfolios
text: CCI is a leading provider of critical nationwide infrastructure consisting of thousands of towers and route miles of fiber. Elevated CAPEX requirements of their tenants to support growth in their networks is conducive of continued earnings growth for CCI.

title: Crown Castle Increases Revolving Credit Facility Commitments to $7.0 Billion and Extends Maturity of Existing Facilities
text: HOUSTON, July 08, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Crown Castle International Corp. (NYSE: CCI) ("Crown Castle") announced today that it amended its Senior Unsecured Credit Facility ("Credit Facility") increasing the commitments under its Senior Unsecured Revolving Credit Facility ("Revolver") by $2.0 billion, for aggregate commitments of $7.0 billion, and extending the maturity of the Credit Facility to July 2027. The Credit Facility consists of a $1.2 billion Senior Unsecured Term Loan A Facility and, after giving effect to the increased commitments, a $7.0 billion Revolver.

title: 7 Oversold Stocks to Buy in July 2022
text: Investors are on the hunt for oversold stocks with bargain valuations that could jump in value once optimism returns to the stock market. The post 7 Oversold Stocks to Buy in July 2022 appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Crown Castle Announces Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call Details
text: HOUSTON, July 06, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Crown Castle International Corp. (NYSE: CCI) ("Crown Castle") plans to release its second quarter 2022 results on Wednesday, July 20, 2022, after the market closes. In conjunction with the release, Crown Castle has scheduled a conference call for Thursday, July 21, 2022, at 10:30 a.m. eastern time. The conference call may be accessed by dialing 800-263-0877 and asking for the Crown Castle call (access code 7823263) at least 30 minutes prior to the start time. The conference call may also be accessed live over the Internet at http://investor.crowncastle.com. Any supplemental materials for the call will be posted on the Crown Castle website at http://investor.crowncastle.com.

title: This Cell Tower Stock Sees Tremendous Growth Ahead
text: Crown Castle International is empowering the 5G rollout while diversifying its infrastructure offerings.
